violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (pork) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection, soups were placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. PIC moved to smaller containers at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

Working containers of cinnamon are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the upstairs storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
Inspector observed wooden paddle in poor repair, observed chipped wood. PIC informed to no longer use paddle. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ceiling fan has an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The doorway threshold was in poor repair, observed exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The floor in the upstairs kitchen area is in poor repair, observed cracked tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025

Employees' purse was stored on top of flour in the upstairs kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, various products were placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

Drinks and ceviche packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023
Inspector observed money being stored in a container with beef. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
Employees were observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
Inspector observed garlic cloves adulterated with white residue. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023

Various products which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Various foods prepared on 9/6 was observed held at 50-67 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below.There is insufficient hot holding equipment to maintain foods at 135 degrees F or above. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023
Beverages were observed stored on the floor outside. Food and drinks must be stored in establishment.. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

Inspector observed the two door cooler in poor repair in the prep area. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2023

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the sauce shelving area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
